Package index

GitHub repository queries

Functions for querying GitHub repository metadata and content

github_branches()
GitHub branches
github_code()
GitHub code
github_commits()
GitHub commits
github_files()
Find, filter, and download files in a GitHub repository
github_files_download()
Download files from GitHub
github_metadata()
GitHub metadata
github_permissions()
GitHub permissions
github_repositories()
GitHub repositories
github_traffic()
GitHub traffic
github_user_events()
GitHub user events
github_workflows()
GitHub workflows

GitHub dependencies

Discover package dependencies and reverse dependencies

github_dependencies()
GitHub dependents
github_dependents()
GitHub dependents

GitHub Pages

Query and scrape GitHub Pages websites

github_pages()
GitHub Pages website
github_pages_files()
Find pages
github_pages_vignettes()
GitHub Pages vignettes

DESCRIPTION file utilities

Extract and parse R package DESCRIPTION files

description_extract()
DESCRIPTION file: extract fields
add_owner_repo()
Add owner/repo

R package repositories

Query and compare R packages across CRAN, Bioconductor, and GitHub

r_repos()
R repositories
r_repos_data()
R repositories data
r_repos_downloads()
Get downloads data from CRAN/Bioconductor/GitHub
r_repos_opts()
R repository options
r_repos_upset_queries()
R repos upset plot queries
